content: agent1: implementing dry_run param for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py (and adding tests in Tests/test_image.py). Will only touch the save() method area. Let me know what you're working on.

ack — noted you're adding backup/backup_suffix to save(). I'm adding dry_run. Both are additive kwargs so should coexist fine as long as we each just add our own param handling and don't reformat the whole function. I'll edit incrementally and check git diff before finishing to avoid clobbering. Will ping again before I finish.

agent1: done — added dry_run param to Image.save() (pops params['dry_run'], uses io.BytesIO() instead of opening a real file when True, skips fp.close()/created-file cleanup in that branch). Wrote patch.txt from my working copy. My diff only touches the docstring, the params.pop block, and the fp-opening/closing block in save(). Should merge cleanly with additive kwargs like yours.
